labels.notes: Vitalie Pani 11:39am — short follow-up (12 min, 984 words). Procedure section explicit: 'performed two injections (one in back, one in knee)'. DEFECT (Classes E + 11 BILLING UNDER-COUNT): only A007A saved — both injections COMPLETELY MISSED. Expected G370A (1st joint/bursa, knee or back) + G371A (additional joint, the other site) + E542A tray. ROOT CAUSE: SOAP procedure-section count phrasing ('two injections') is not parsed by augment_procedures_from_soap_text — the augment table is binary signal-presence (joint_injection ✓/✗), no count regex. validate_procedure_evidence may have also dropped the LLM-extracted procedure if doctor was quiet during the procedure. Dx 724 (lumbago) is correct given low back primary.
